command:
ssh -i /home/jose/.ssh/n8n_bridge -o StrictHostKeyChecking=no -o ConnectTimeout=10 jose@192.168.0.202 bash << 'REMOTE'
echo "=== Current time vs last activity ==="
date '+now: %H:%M:%S'

echo "=== Last 25 gateway.log lines (full picture since 19:51) ==="
tail -25 /home/jose/.hermes/logs/gateway.log 2>/dev/null

echo ""
echo "=== Is there a stuck/pending batch? Check errors.log for recent issues ==="
tail -8 /home/jose/.hermes/logs/errors.log 2>/dev/null

echo ""
echo "=== Webhook pending count (are messages queuing at Telegram?) ==="
curl -s "https://api.telegram.org/bot8849049212:AAH2CHM_CDLDeTLfVxw7UGz5aO1weVBdnpw/getWebhookInfo" | python3 -c "import sys,json; d=json.load(sys.stdin); r=d.get('result',{}); print('pending:', r.get('pending_update_count'), '| last_error:', r.get('last_error_message'), '| last_error_date:', r.get('last_error_date'))"

echo ""
echo "=== Gateway still active? ==="
systemctl is-active hermes-gateway
REMOTE
